content.en:
Time flies.

An extradimensional era is gradually passing.

"Damn, this guy has been in retreat for an extradimensional epoch time!"

In the Void Breaking City, a half-step transcendent realm said resentfully in his heart.

It is normal for the peak realm god to retreat for an extradimensional era, which is not too long, but almost all of them are within their own forces, and it is outrageous to retreat for an extradimensional era within the Broken Void City.

You must know that renting a mansion in Broken Void City, even if it is an ordinary mansion, will cost millions of extradimensional eras.

Many peak realm gods can't get together a million extradimensional eras, how can they spend it on renting a mansion!

Under normal circumstances, those peak realm gods were renting mansions for a short time in Broken Void City, and the cost was not large.

It is very rare and outrageous like Ye Tian, and it is even rarer for an extradimensional era to retreat inside the mansion he rents.

However, he has been waiting for so long that he can only continue to wait.

There was one situation that he was most afraid of, that is, Ye Tian broke through the half-step transcendent realm, and then condensed the transcendental heart domain and used up those immortal golden pith, which would not be good.

However, there was a lot of movement in breaking through the half-step transcendent realm, and the moment the superdimensional Dao species was condensed, even the superdimensional formation could not be concealed.

At present, he had not sensed any signs of Ye Tian's breakthrough.

Therefore, Ye Tian should still be the peak realm god.

"Wait for another extradimensional era, if this guy doesn't come out yet, then send his men to keep an eye on him!"

This half-step transcendent realm secretly said in his heart.

......

Inside the mansion.

Ye Tian was at a critical moment, and his extra-dimensional heart domain and super-dimensional power were all transforming.

Once the transformation is successful, his extradimensional power will step into the realm of Xiaocheng.

Time passed slowly, and finally a powerful aura erupted from him, and the extradimensional power condensed to an extremely terrifying level emanated, far surpassing the past.

"At least seven or eight times more powerful than the superdimensional power that I have initially comprehended!.!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

And his extra-dimensional heart domain has also expanded to a range of dozens of light-years in diameter, containing more extra-dimensional power, but the difficulty of refining will also increase.

How much time does it take to refine the power of the extradimensional from the Xiaocheng realm to the Dacheng realm?

At this time, there was still one drop of the immortal golden pith left, and he tried it with this last drop of immortal golden picedony, and he could continue to refine the immortal golden picedony, but the effect was much worse, and if he wanted to refine the superdimensional power to the Dacheng realm, the immortal golden pith needed was far more than a hundred, and it might even be a thousand drops or even more.

And if he wants to buy so much immortal golden marrow, even if all the extra-dimensional resources he carries are exhausted, he can't buy them.

"Gotta find a way to earn more extradimensional resources!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, that was a matter for later, and what he needed now was to condense the fourteenth Eternal Realm Spirit.

In this extradimensional era, he was not only refining the golden pith of immortality, but also refining the eternal Dao seed.

Now, it won't be long before the Eternal Dao Seed is refined to the extreme.

Subsequently.

He continued to retreat and refine the Eternal Dao Seed, and since his extradimensional power had been raised to the Xiaocheng Realm, the effect of assisting in refining the Eternal Dao Seed was even better, and in less than a hundred trillion years to the Dao Era, he had successfully refined the Eternal Dao Seed to its current limit.

"Begin to condense the fourteenth Eternal Realm Spirit!"

Ye Tian immediately began to break through.

Originally, it was almost impossible to condense the fourteenth Eternal Realm Spirit, but his extradimensional power reached the Xiaocheng realm, and with the help of the superdimensional power of the Xiaocheng realm, he forcibly shattered the indestructible shackles and condensed the fourteenth perfect eternal realm spirit.

Immediately afterward, Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed and Physical Body were skyrocketing.

This breakthrough, the increase in strength is even more exaggerated than when the thirteenth Eternal Realm Spirit was condensed, which may be because of breaking the boundary, so the increase in strength is even greater.

After the breakthrough in cultivation, Ye Tian's refining of the Eternal Dao Seed was still not slow, but if he wanted to refine to the limit of the Eternal Dao Seed again, it would be very difficult, and he might really need hundreds of Transcendent Dimensional Eras, unless he could obtain the Transcendent Resources that would help him quickly refine the Eternal Dao Seed.

"It seems that the matter of earning extradimensional resources is imminent!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, he still had one more thing to deal with, and that was the powerhouse of the half-step transcendent realm.

"Then lead him out!"

Ye Tian said darkly. []

With his current strength, he really has the hope of killing that half-step superdimensional realm, after all, he still has that fragment of the superdimensional dao soldier, and with his realm of small superdimensional power, his current cultivation is enough to exert the more powerful power of that superdimensional dao fragment.

But he needed to keep it a secret, so that the battle could not be spied on by other half-step extradimensional realms.

Therefore, he bought a high-level super dimensional secret treasure, the Hidden Heaven Disk, which can cover an area, and this is what it does.

"It's time to go!"

Ye Tian came out of the mansion and then flew out of the Broken Void City.

......

"This guy is finally out!!!"

The half-step transcendent realm powerhouse, the Silver Blood Realm God, said angrily.

Swish!

He immediately shuttled over and followed Ye Tian, as long as the other party was a little away from Broken Void City, he would immediately make a move.

Soon.

And they were far away from the Broken City.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian stopped, staring at the location of the Silver Blood Realm God.

"What are you going to do with me?"

Ye Tian asked deliberately.

Wow!

The Silver Blood Realm God revealed his body and said in some surprise: "You can actually spy on my whereabouts, it's a bit extraordinary!"

"If you're okay, please leave!"

Ye Tian said.

"Something!" the Silver Blood Realm God sneered (Zhao's Zhao) and said, "That's !! killing you"

Rumble!!!

The silver-blooded realm god urges the real extra-dimensional power, killing it with one hand, and its speed is enough to make any peak realm god unable to react, and this is an extremely powerful extra-dimensional technique, enough to bombard the top peak realm god, even if the other party has a super-dimensional secret treasure, it is absolutely impossible to stop the library.

However, he soon became confused.

Rumble!

Ye Tian urged the power of the extra-dimensional, burst out all his cultivation, and performed a super-dimensional technique.

The attack of the Silver Blood Realm God fell on Ye Tian's body, and although it broke through layers of defense, it still did not reach Ye Tian's body in the end.

In other words, Ye Tian blocked his blow.

"The power of the super dimension is Xiaocheng, you have not only condensed the super dimensional heart domain, but also refined the power of the super dimension to the realm of Xiao Cheng!!!!"

The Silver Blood Realm God felt fear in his heart, how could such a peak Realm God still exist!!。
